creator: freebsd@gushi.org
text:
Created attachment 230293
recursive update patch

I am the maintainer.  Enclosed patch removes required patch files, updates base version to main, changes master site to github (which is the new site), as well as resolving CVE-2021-34555 and any other CVEs.

Ran portlint and poudriere testport under i386 and amd64, runs clean.  Logs are available at ISC's poudriere if need be.
